signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple USD (RLUSD) has launched in full-scale rollout across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of mid-April 2026[2]. This deployment is driving record-breaking transaction volume on the XRPL and represents a major milestone for Ripple's payment infrastructure[2].

signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC has officially dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, marking a major regulatory victory that has fundamentally shifted market sentiment around XRP[1]. This resolution removes a significant legal overhang that had suppressed XRP's price potential for years[1].

signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP ETF approvals are in the final approval stages, with institutional adoption at all-time highs following regulatory clarity[2]. This development positions XRP for significant institutional capital inflows[1].
